note: Bump kb_version on any meaningful content change (new/removed knowledge object, changed business rule, filled-in TODO). Loader logic (app/knowledge/help/loader.py) does NOT read version numbers to decide reload - it hot-reloads a file whenever that file's mtime changes, regardless of this version string. kb_version is for humans/logs/debugging ("which content generation is this"), not a cache key.
disabled_intents_note: Intent id (knowledge_object 'id', e.g. 'RETURN_REQUEST_CANCEL') listed here is EXCLUDED from the production TODO/MISSING_FROM_DOCUMENT fail-fast check in loader.py - use this to soft-launch a domain whose content isn't finished yet without blocking the whole /help service from starting. Empty for now: nothing has shipped to production yet, so every intent is still subject to the fail-fast check the moment APP_ENV=production is set.
